text: Mail app. Third-party apps (WhatsApp, Messenger, Signal) are also supported. Third-party apps (WhatsApp, Messenger, Signal) are also supported. Review the pre-filled content and make any changes if needed. Review the pre-filled content and make any changes if needed. Send the message as you normally would. Send the message as you normally would. Example: "Draft an email to my manager explaining that I'll be late to the morning meeting due to a doctor's appointment." Using location for contextual suggestions Ask Claude for location-based recommendations (for example: "What's nearby for dinner?"). Ask Claude for location-based recommendations (for example: "What's nearby for dinner?"). Claude will request access to your location if not already granted. Claude will request access to your location if not already granted. Based on your location, Claude provides relevant suggestions. Based on your location, Claude provides relevant suggestions. You can view locations on a map and get navigation directions. You can view locations on a map and get navigation directions. Example: "Find good restaurants near me that are open now." Displaying locations with Maps When Claude suggests locations, they can be displayed on an interactive map. When Claude suggests locations, they can be displayed on an interactive map. Tap on any location to see more details. Tap on any location to see more details. Select a location to open it in Apple Maps for navigation. Select a location to open it in Apple Maps for navigation. Get turn-by-turn directions directly from the map. Get turn-by-turn directions directly from the map. Example: "Show me coffee shops within walking distance on a map." Managing your calendar Ask Claude to check your schedule or create events. Ask Claude to check your schedule or create events. Claude will request calendar access if not already granted. Claude will request calendar access if not already granted. For checking availability: Claude reads your calendar and identifies free slots. For checking availability: Claude reads your calendar and identifies free slots. For creating events: Claude prepares event details and adds them to your calendar. For creating events: Claude prepares event details and adds them to your calendar. You can edit or delete events as needed. You can edit or delete events as needed. Examples: "When am I free this week for a 30-minute meeting?" "When am I free this week for a 30-minute meeting?" "Schedule a dentist appointment for next Friday at 10 AM."
